steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the 2020 population of Acaxochitlán. The answer must directly state that figure.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "As a municipality in Hidalgo, Acaxochitlán is responsible for providing public services to its population.": omits the 2020 population figure entirely. ✗
  • "Home to 40,583 people, the governmental region was responsible for providing water treatment to its population in 2010.": cites population data but from the wrong year. ✗
  • "As of 2020, Acaxochitlán was one of 84 municipalities in Hidalgo, Mexico.": focuses on unrelated geographic or administrative information. ✗
  • "In 2020, the municipality of Acaxochitlán had a population of 46,065.": directly states the 2020 population. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
